subject: RE: FW: 17–19 First Avenue, Surfers Paradise (Property) : AMFS 2 Pty Ltd, Aryton Mansi, Widegate Pty Limited, Freddie Sheene
snippet: Hi Aryton Yes, I can take a call from you. Please call my mobile 0477 065 871. I did try your mobile a little while ago and have since sent you an email. Please review the email and its attachments
